---
name: Skill revision
about: Report an issue with an existing skill — outdated content, incorrect citation, scope problem, or failing the quality bar
labels: skill-revision
---

## Skill path

<!-- e.g. engineering/development/skills/propose-conventional-commit/SKILL.md -->

## What is wrong?

<!-- Be specific: which claim is incorrect, which citation is wrong, which step is outdated. -->

## Suggested fix

<!-- What should it say instead? Include evidence where the current content is factually wrong. -->

## Fix vs. Deprecate

<!-- Should this skill be fixed (content updated) or deprecated (superseded by a newer practice)?
     See STANDARD.md § Fix vs. Deprecate for the decision table. -->

- [ ] Fix — update content
- [ ] Deprecate — point to replacement skill: `___`
